description: Drive-time isochrone polygons per row via openrouteservice / google / mapbox / OSRM. Drop-in for Alteryx's Drive Time / Trade Area tools.

inputs.description: Upstream DataFrame with Shapely Point in geometry_column OR latitude/longitude columns

outputs.description: Same columns; geometry_column replaced with isochrone Polygon per row

drive_minutes.label: Drive Minutes
drive_minutes.description: Isochrone size in minutes (e.g. 15 = polygon reachable within 15 min drive)

api_key_env_var.label: API Key Env Var
api_key_env_var.description: Env var holding the routing provider's API key. Not needed for `provider=osrm`.

latitude_column.label: Latitude Column
latitude_column.description: If the input has no geometry column yet, name the lat column here + longitude_column

longitude_column.label: Longitude Column
longitude_column.description: Pair with latitude_column when input has no geometry
